heading: Featured Work
description: Some of my best projects and technical achievements.

projects.title: Hope Enterprise University College — CMS
projects.description: Redesigned and implemented the HEUC website using PayloadCMS. Highlights HEUC's vision, mission, objectives, and latest updates with an intuitive interface built on ShadcnUI + TailwindCSS.

projects.title: Sion Football Academy Website
projects.description: Official website showcasing the Academy's mission, training programs, gallery, team, and contact info — designed to attract players, partners, and supporters.

projects.title: Nucleus Institute
projects.description: Automation studio for pipelines, vector databases, chat interfaces and synthetic data generation powered by an in-house fine-tuned AI model.

projects.title: Ethiochef — Recipe Management System
projects.description: Meal recipe app for 200k+ users with CI/CD pipelines (40% faster releases), Redis optimisations (60% speed boost), and Chapa/ETSwitch payment integrations.

projects.title: Digital Merkato
projects.description: Admin dashboard with full CRUD operations for an Ethiopian e-commerce platform. Leverages React.js, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI for smooth data management.

projects.title: Chains Charity
projects.description: A React-based charity website to mobilise support for breaking the cycle of poverty. Features localisation in both Amharic and English.
